data.title: Young employees being asked to increase time in office for more productivity, in line with industry expectations.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the number of COVID-19 cases has reached over 5 million worldwide, with a death toll exceeding 300,000. Furthermore, WHO has warned that the number of cases could continue to rise if proper measures are not implemented. The US remains the most affected country with over 1.5 million cases and 90,000 deaths. Despite efforts to flatten the curve, experts stress the importance of continued social distancing and hygiene practices to prevent further spread of the virus. The global economy has also been significantly impacted, with unemployment rates soaring and businesses facing uncertain futures.Authorities around the world are working tirelessly to combat the pandemic and provide support for those affected.

data.title: IDEA sponsors Clean50 Summit in Toronto, uniting sustainability leaders for an inclusive, cleaner energy future.
data.description: Toronto, the International District Energy Association (IDEA) is sponsoring the 2025 Clean50 Summit, a significant event in Canada acknowledging and bringing together sustainability leaders. Taking place at Evergreen Brickworks, the Summit gathers innovators nationwide working towards a greener, stronger, and more inclusive energy future. Since 2011, the Clean50 Summit has been a platform uniting leaders from various sectors such as business, government, and higher education to promote sustainable practices.

data.title: Truckers face challenges with Trump's new 25% tariff on heavy trucks and parts, set for next month. Companies lack policy specifics.
data.description: Next month, a 25% tax will be implemented on heavy-duty trucks and their components. Unfortunately, companies are lacking specific information regarding this policy change.
